section.heading: General qualification of officers for promotion to higher permanent grade

content.p: No officer may be promoted to a higher permanent grade on the active list until the officer has passed a satisfactory mental and physical examination in accordance with regulations prescribed by the Secretary.

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: Provisions similar to those in this section were contained in section 854 of this title prior to repeal by Pub. L. 107–372.
